title: Mo-Critters
description: Ambient mobs made only for your eyes to see.
body:
Not enough ambient mobs for your tast?

Introducing Mo-Critters!

This datapack by [Rainy Realm Creations](https://modrinth.com/organization/rainy-realm-creations) brings all new critters to the game! Currently including the firefly & butterfly, this pack is the way to go!

Support:

For questions, bug reports, suggestions, and any other support, check out our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/XHbR7pSwdW)! You might also get sneak peaks at upcoming updates!

Mo-Config!

Run the following command to customize your experience! ``` /function mo-crit:config ``` You can configure so much here!

Mo-Items!

As critters are ambient, there will be very few, if any, custom items from this pack.

Integrations:

Mo-Critters contains several integrations with other packs. Please bear in mind sometimes this list may be a little behind. All integrations are always optional, and only exist to make your personal experience better. - [Horde Nights](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blood-moon/versions) Integration for 1.20+ - This integration blocks the spawning of critters during active negative lunar events, keeping the ominous ambiance. There may be more, however these are the only tested integrations. If you would like a proper integration with another pack, please reach out!
